revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Commons category}} {{Birth year category header|161|7}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude> [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:1617 births]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
